workContext.title: Move authoritative task and claim mutations off the single live summary ref onto fixed hash-sharded task and claim ref families with deterministic shard routing and compare-and-swap publication per shard.
workContext.summary: Implemented shard-owned task and claim publication, summary projection updates, manifest-repair handling, and shard-aware regression coverage.
workContext.planTitle: Implement shared coordination v1 architecture hardening
